title: eulophia longibracteata
intro: Eulophia longibracteata, also known as the Yellow Hibiscus Orchid, is a species of orchid native to tropical Africa. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, primarily due to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Eulophia longibracteata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Traditionally, the plant has been used to prepare herbal infusions and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
